description.ko: 날카로운 기하학적 구조와 디지털 오류 미학이 충돌하는 KURO-X의 인상적인 비주얼 탐구입니다. 파편화된 벡터 형상과 생동감 넘치는 글리치 왜곡을 혼합하여 하이테크의 유동적인 상태를 포착합니다.
description.en: A striking visual exploration of KURO-X, where sharp geometric structures collide with digital error aesthetics. This piece captures a state of high-tech flux, blending fragmented vector shapes with vibrant glitch distortion.

prompt: KURO-X character portrait, geometric glitch art style, sharp polygonal fragments, digital disintegration, pixel sorting effects, chromatic aberration, futuristic cybernetic aesthetic, high contrast black and electric cyan, overlapping vector shapes, tech-noir lighting, 8k resolution, intricate digital artifacts.
